data.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: test-onboarding-semgrep.sh contains zero assertions for 'timeout 120' — the guard exists in SKILL.md (Phase 1 Step 0 dependency pre-scan at lines 135-143) but is unverified. File path: tests/skills/test-onboarding-semgrep.sh (not tests/scripts/ as stated in ticket). Fix: add test_semgrep_install_timeout_guard function asserting 'timeout 120' appears in SKILL.md Semgrep install block. Testing_mode: UPDATE (adding test for existing correct behavior).
